title: Health Charted Session Status
description: Fast on-ramp for new sessions. Snapshot of current state, not a history.

quick_context.description: Current focus, what changed recently, where things stand right now

current_priorities.description: What matters most right now, ordered by importance

pending_reference_updates.description: Reference files flagged for interpretation review after source data changed. Persists across sessions until resolved.

file.description: Reference file path relative to reference/

reason.description: What changed that may affect the interpretation

triggered_by.description: Which source file change triggered this flag

onboarding.description: Onboarding progress tracker. Null before first run. Populated by LLM on first session.

phase_1.description: First visit steps. Welcome with capabilities, chief complaint, structured intake, privacy. Each holds a timestamp when completed, or null if pending.

intake.description: Structured health intake covering history, medications, supplements, allergies, family history, lifestyle, providers, labs, goals

phase_2.description: Infrastructure steps. Happen after first conversation delivers value, or next session. Each holds a timestamp when completed, or null if pending.
